unmapped_risk: A sudden US-EU coordinated mandate forcing sovereign AI data residency and open-licensing of foundational model weights, instantly fragmenting the hyperscaler cloud revenue model that constitutes ~45% of QQQ's market cap.
underweighted_risk: Options market maker gamma compression in mega-cap concentrated indices. The market treats this as microstructure noise, but when volatility spikes, MM hedging flips negative and forces systematic delta-selling into spot markets, creating a 40%+ drawdown cascade that fundamentals cannot cushion.
structural_fragility: Market-cap weighting creates a non-linear concentration feedback loop; with the top five holdings comprising ~40% of the index, there is no internal diversification buffer to absorb correlated regulatory or liquidity shocks to the AI infrastructure thesis.
contagion_path: QQQ NAV discount triggers broad risk-off -> SMH suffers forced liquidation as tech-complex correlation spikes to 0.95+ -> AVGO and LITE lose hyperscaler CapEx visibility -> portfolio rebalancing forces USD cash allocation, pressuring G3B.SI dividend stability.
watch_items: Authorized Participant creation unit volume diverging from ETF NAV premium/discount spread beyond ±0.8%
DOJ/FTC antitrust dockets explicitly naming 'AI model weights' or 'cloud compute integration' as structural monopolies requiring forced divestiture
